Results confirms all 3 seeded conditions fired (batch >= 2 via Turn 1 + Turn 3, overlap rejection with exact string 'path_overlap_with:unit_a2', scope violation on src/seeds/users.json) + embeds the wall-clock table (parallel 3 turns @ 1.97s vs sequential 6 turns @ 2.00s, ratio 1.02x, turn count 3 vs 6 as meaningful signal). Phase completion review per pr-review-checklist.md passed. select_next_unit reports all_complete: true -- all 13 phases done, all 58 units complete, both tracked ISSUEs resolved, 2 new bugs documented for follow-up but not blockers. Suite 347 -> 356. The development-harness skill's v2 upgrade is complete.
